summary: Summary: The conversation begins with Speaker1, who had waited in line for half an hour, reaching the front and feeling excited and showing happiness but also experiencing frustration from the heat. Speaker1 then reacts loudly and with growing frustration when told they were in the wrong line, repeating "no, no, no." Speaker2 initially responds neutral, then shifts to frustration as they correct the mistake (pointing out the wrong sheet) and instruct Speaker1 to go back or fill out the paper elsewhere. Speaker1, still experiencing frustration, references Sonya at work and says they must return to work, cutting off their reply. Overall trajectory: Speaker1 moves from excited and happiness into sustained frustration; Speaker2 moves from neutral into frustration while trying to resolve the situation.
